programs.title: The Fast History Of
programs.desc: Take a look at the Nabisco history, filled with boardroom power struggles, individual vendettas and a few monumental mishaps.

programs.title: Life After People
programs.desc: After humanity ceases to exist, the global retail machine collapses. Malls decay and shipping lanes turn deadly, while grocery stores become war zones for rodents and predators.

programs.title: Inked: the Great Indian Election
programs.desc: The narrator provides a behind the scenes look into the organisation of the Bihar elections, underscoring the crucial contribution of the Election Commission of India.

programs.title: Forged in Fire: Knife or Death
programs.desc: Competitors test the mettle of a hybrid Yatagan sabre, a two-handed Bowie knife and other bladed weapons. Later, a female bladesmith comes close to a first-time achievement.

programs.title: OMG! Yeh Mera India
programs.desc: Mechanical engineer Arun Kumar Purushothaman channels his creativity into unique projects. Subsequently, he crafts fully functional miniature vehicles for his children's enjoyment.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Ivy and his son discover a locker containing mysterious sports gear. Meanwhile, Rene's assertiveness leads to a satisfying victory, refusing to be exploited.

actor: Darrell Sheets,Jarrod Schulz,Brandi Passante,Dave Hester,Dan Dotson,Laura Dotson,Brandon Sheets,Ivy Calvin,Rene Nezhoda,Casey Nezhoda,Thom Beers,Emily Wears,Mary Padian,Kenny Crossley,Justin Bryant,Edwina Registre,Shana Dahan,Barry Weiss
